description_long: This is a modern lounge chair featuring a sturdy wooden frame with a natural finish, complemented by plush, light gray fabric cushions on the seat and backrest. The chair has wide, flat armrests and a high, slightly reclined backrest, both upholstered in a smooth, tan-brown leather or leather-like material. The seat is deep and generously padded, providing ample comfort for extended sitting. The design is angular yet inviting, with the wooden frame forming a continuous, geometric outline around the seat and back. The rear and sides of the chair are also clad in the same tan-brown material, giving it a cohesive and upscale appearance. This chair would be well-suited for urban parks, lobbies, or stylish waiting areas.
description: A modern lounge chair with a wooden frame, light gray fabric cushions, and tan-brown leather armrests and back. The design is angular, comfortable, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, high backrest, and broad armrests with contrasting fabric and leather surfaces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the reclined backrest, thick cushioning, and the angular wooden frame supporting the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid tan-brown back panel and the continuous wooden frame structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the depth of the seat and the robust armrest design.
